steps.title: Find the shared topic
steps.content: Text 1 says scientists still have much to learn about sloths because they are hard to study. Text 2 describes a monitor that lets scientists learn about sloths' hidden activities and correct misconceptions.

steps.title: Choose the common focus
steps.content: The matching topic is scientists' efforts to understand sloths. Choice A appears only in Text 1, Choice C appears only in Text 2, and Choice D is not discussed in either text. The answer is B.
